projects.title: DAR AL KHALIJ
projects.description: Full-stack website for DEC Engineering Consultant — a premium architectural & engineering firm based in the Gulf.
projects.longDescription: Designed and developed the official web presence for DEC Engineering Consultant (Dar Al Khalij), a high-end structural and architectural consulting firm. The site was built to reflect the firm's identity as a visionary force in the Gulf construction industry — cinematic hero animations, floating 3D geometry, and a dark editorial aesthetic communicate scale and prestige. The project involved close collaboration with the client to define brand language, content strategy, and responsive layout across all devices.

projects.title: STRIKE BOXING CRM
projects.description: Custom CRM system for a professional boxing gym — managing members, coaches, attendance, payments, and analytics.
projects.longDescription: Built a fully bespoke CRM platform for Strike Boxing Egypt, a professional boxing and fitness gym. The system handles the complete lifecycle of gym operations: member onboarding, coach management, session attendance tracking, payment processing, and performance analytics. Features include role-based access control (Staff, Coach, Member), real-time dashboards, audit logs, and a clean mobile-optimized interface. Deployed on Google Cloud Run using Docker, with Firestore as the backend database and Firebase Auth for authentication.

projects.title: ALPHA CALISTHENICS
projects.description: Performance website for Alpha Calisthenics — an elite bodyweight training brand built around Coach Akram.
projects.longDescription: Developed the complete web platform for Alpha Calisthenics, a premium coaching brand led by Coach Akram specializing in elite bodyweight training. The site was designed to convert visitors into clients through high-impact visual storytelling, transformation galleries, and structured program tiers. Features include animated hero sections, Google Auth integration for sign-in, a dedicated coaching philosophy section, and dynamic pricing tiers. The dark, high-contrast aesthetic reinforces the discipline-focused brand identity.

projects.title: ATPLVECTOR
projects.description: AI-powered ATPL theory learning platform — interactive simulators, visual systems logic, and immersive aviation education.
projects.longDescription: Founded and built ATPLVector, an aviation education SaaS platform designed to help pilots master ATPL theory visually and interactively. Drawing from personal experience as a student pilot with 70 flight hours and 750 ground school hours at Dento Aviation, I identified the fundamental shortcoming of static PDFs and lecture slides. ATPLVector delivers 14 subjects with 65+ interactive simulators, AI-driven roleplay scenarios, and immersive systems logic modules — all engineered for EASA 2026 standards. The platform is invite-only beta with a growing waitlist.
